responsibilities: Design and prototype analog and digital circuits for consumer, industrial, or automotive electronic products from concept to production.
Develop multi-layer PCB layouts using Altium Designer, ensuring signal integrity, thermal performance, and manufacturability.
Select and qualify electronic components such as microcontrollers, sensors, and power ICs based on cost, availability, and performance requirements.
Conduct bring-up, debugging, and validation testing of prototype boards using oscilloscopes, logic analyzers, and spectrum analyzers.
Collaborate with firmware and mechanical engineering teams to integrate electronic hardware into complete product assemblies.
Perform EMI/EMC pre-compliance testing and implement design changes to meet regulatory certification standards.
Create and maintain schematic diagrams, bill of materials, and design documentation throughout the product development lifecycle.
Lead root-cause analysis and failure investigations for hardware defects identified during testing or field deployment.
Optimize circuit designs for power efficiency, cost reduction, and manufacturability while meeting performance specifications.
Support transition from prototype to mass production by working with contract manufacturers on DFM and DFT reviews.
